description: You are a sustainability analyst preparing data for an Environmental Product Declaration (EPD). Using openLCA, the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip), and LCIA methods (~/LCA_Imports/lcia_methods.zip), generate a multi-category LCIA report for a transport or agricultural production process. The report must cover at least five impact categories: Global Warming Potential, Acidification Potential, Eutrophication Potential, Ozone Depletion Potential, and at least one additional category (e.g., Human Health particulates, Smog Formation, or Freshwater Ecotoxicity). Export the results, including the impact category name, unit, and numeric value for each category, to ~/LCA_Results/epd_results.csv.
